raw.objective: “to investigate the potential effect of CYP1A2 genetic polymorphisms on carbamazepine pharmacokinetics in children with epilepsy”
raw.covariates: Tested:AGE, WT, SEX, CBZ daily dose, CYP1A2 polymorphisms, VPA Included: SEX, CBZ daily dose, CYP1A2 polymorphisms on CL
raw.observations: In CYP1A2*1A/*1A subjects, CL was increased by approximately 11% compared to CYP1A2*1A/*1F and CYP1A2*1F/*1F subjects. WT did not seem to influence CL here
raw.equations: CL=(theta1 + theta2*SEX + theta3*CYP1A2 + theta4*DD)*exp(eta1) Although the paper reports the use of ADVAN1, no parameter values for volume were given. As such, the model can only be used as a simplified PK model using the following equation for Css: Css-avg=(Dose*S)/(Tau*CL/F)*exp(eps1) The implementation of an exponential inter-individual variability of CL was assumed here, as it was not reported in the paper what form was finally found to best describe the data DD: daily dose of CBZ in mg/day SEX: gender (female: 0, male: 1) CYP1A2: polymorphisms (0 for *1F/*1F or *1A/*1F; 1 for *1A/*1A)

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: CL=(theta1 + theta2*SEX + theta3*CYP1A2 + theta4*DD)*exp(eta1) Although the paper reports the use of ADVAN1, no parameter values for volume were given. As such, the model can only be used as a simplified PK model using the following equation for Css: Css-avg=(Dose*S)/(Tau*CL/F)*exp(eps1) The implementation of an exponential inter-individual variability of CL was assumed here, as it was not reported in the paper what form was finally found to best describe the data DD: daily dose of CBZ in mg/day SEX: gender (female: 0, male: 1) CYP1A2: polymorphisms (0 for *1F/*1F or *1A/*1F; 1 for *1A/*1A)
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.objective: “to investigate the potential effect of CYP1A2 genetic polymorphisms on carbamazepine pharmacokinetics in children with epilepsy”

covariates.raw: Tested:AGE, WT, SEX, CBZ daily dose, CYP1A2 polymorphisms, VPA Included: SEX, CBZ daily dose, CYP1A2 polymorphisms on CL

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
